differentials.name: cystic adventitial disease of popliteal artery
differentials.raw: cystic adventitial disease of popliteal artery

context: Doppler waveforms of posterior tibial artery diminished during muscle contractions | medial deviation of artery (29%), popliteal stenosis (11%), poststenotic dilatation (8%) | arteriography with typical medial deviation of popliteal artery before + after gastrocnemius | popliteal artery thrombosis / occlusion
